description: 8 targeted fixes and enhancements: proposal bugs, deals table, relationship graph touchpoints, entity filter, meeting next steps, AI email quality, ABM demo relationship graph, inline lead creation, and user writing preference learning

userStories.title: Fix Proposal Generation 400/500 Errors
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want proposal generation to work without errors so that I can create proposals from meeting context
acceptanceCriteria: Replace metadata column with rendered_html in proposals SELECT query
Read pipeline errors from style_config._pipeline_error
Fix thumbnail to use brand_config.thumbnail_url only
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Stop Ops Deals Table Redirecting to Pipeline
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want the Deals ops table to display inline instead of redirecting to the pipeline page
acceptanceCriteria: Remove standard_deals from DEDICATED_ROUTES
Deals table renders inline in ops
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Communication Events to Relationship Graph Timeline
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want the relationship graph to show all touchpoints including emails, calls, and meetings so I get a complete picture
acceptanceCriteria: Add communication_events query to fetchContactGraph and fetchCompanyGraph
Add normalizeCommunicationToTimeline function
Add communication record type with Mail icon and cyan colors to TimelineView
Limit to 50 most recent communications per entity
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Simplify Company/Contact Toggle on Relationship Graph
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want the entity filter to be a simple 3-button toggle like the contacts view
acceptanceCriteria: Add All/Contacts/Companies toggle with emerald highlight
Filter entities before search filter in useMemo chain
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Wire 6 Working Meeting Next Steps Actions
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want all 6 next-step actions on the meeting page to work so I can take immediate action
acceptanceCriteria: Expand to 6 actions: follow_up_email, generate_proposal, create_task, create_deal, share_recording, book_call
Wire generate_proposal to ProposalQuickGenerate via useImperativeHandle
Wire follow_up_email to generate-follow-up edge function
Wire create_task, create_deal, book_call to quick-add modal
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Strip Em-Dashes and Inject Date in All AI Email Prompts
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want AI-generated emails to never contain em-dashes and reference today's date
acceptanceCriteria: Add stripEmDashes utility to generate-email-sequence
Apply to both Tier 1 (Claude) and Tier 2 (Gemini) outputs
Add today's date to Tier 1 and Tier 2 prompts
Add em-dash stripping to follow-up composer return values
Deploy to staging
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Relationship Graph Scene to ABM Demo Sandbox
userStories.description: As a prospect viewing the ABM demo, I want to see the relationship graph feature
acceptanceCriteria: Create SandboxRelationships.tsx with SVG-based interactive graph
Nodes show contacts, deals, companies with health/engagement coloring
Clicking a node opens detail panel
Register in VIEW_MAP, MOBILE_TABS, NAV_ITEMS, FLOW_ORDER
Update TOTAL_VIEWS from 6 to 7
Typecheck passes (landing package)
userStories.notes: Completed. New SandboxRelationships.tsx created, sandbox wiring done.

userStories.title: ABM Campaign Inline Lead Creation + URL Params
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want to add leads directly from the table view and via URL params for fast campaign link creation
acceptanceCriteria: Add inline quick-add form with domain, name, email, title, company, campaign fields
Campaign name autocompletes from existing campaigns
Enter key submits, calls campaign-enrich for single prospect
Add short URL param aliases: f, l, id, t
Auto-create campaign link when CreatorView loads with query params
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Inline Writing Preference Capture on AI Edit/Reject
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want to provide writing preference feedback when I edit or reject an AI suggestion so future suggestions improve
acceptanceCriteria: Add style feedback popover when user edits AI-generated email
Quick toggles for formality (1-5), directness (1-5), warmth (1-5)
Text field for words to avoid (appends to user_tone_settings.words_to_avoid)
Text field for preferred phrases (appends to user_tone_settings.preferred_keywords)
Pre-populate from toneSettingsService.getToneSettings('email')
Save via toneSettingsService.saveToneSettings() UPSERT
Record approved_edited signal to autopilot_signals
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: Completed. StyleFeedbackPopover.tsx created, wired into ApprovalReviewDialog.tsx.

userStories.title: Surface Writing Preferences in Follow-Up Composer Edge Function
userStories.description: As a system, I want the follow-up email composer to read the user's tone settings so generated emails match confirmed style
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch user_tone_settings for content_type='email' in generate-follow-up
Fetch user_tone_settings for content_type='email' in generate-email-sequence
Map formality, words_to_avoid, preferred_keywords, cta_style, email_sign_off into WritingStyle block
Pass buildWritingStyleBlock() output into system prompt
Deploy updated edge functions to staging
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed. generate-follow-up fetches full tone settings, generate-email-sequence injects tone into context. Deployed to staging.
